description: Perform a 'Product Sunsetting' workflow for the 'Vintage Camera Lens' in the WooCommerce admin panel. Set the product's catalog visibility to hidden and its inventory status to out of stock. Update the product short description by appending exactly this text: '**DISCONTINUED: This item is no longer available.**'. Save the product changes.

metadata.expected_notice_text: **DISCONTINUED: This item is no longer available.**
